expand_hwnds.description: HWNDs to expand UI trees for. Focused window is auto-expanded — list ADDITIONAL ones only.

done_so_far.description: Factual progress from VERIFIED STATE. Mention phase (launch/interact/verify/done), what succeeded, what failed. Min 50 words.

next_step.description: Specific next instruction. Name keys, text to type, or element type to find (not hardcoded IDs). If stuck, diagnose and suggest different approach. Min 50 words.
